creator: andy.lavr@gmail.com
text:
> It fails on ffmpeg support (not in my tests).

# This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
# No user-servicable parts inside!
# Options for opencv-2.3.0.r
_OPTIONS_READ=opencv-2.3.0.r
WITH_EIGEN2=true
WITHOUT_FFMPEG=true
WITHOUT_GSTREAMER=true
WITHOUT_GTK=true
WITH_JASPER=true
WITH_JPEG=true
WITHOUT_OPENEXR=true
WITH_PNG=true
WITHOUT_PYTHON=true
WITHOUT_QT4=true
WITHOUT_TBB=true
WITH_TIFF=true
WITH_V4L=true
WITHOUT_XINE=true



> What ffmpeg version do you have installed? Is it 0.7.1 portrevision 4?


# pkg_info -E ffm\*
ffmpeg-0.7.1_4,1


> Please try to recompile ffmpeg first.


It did not help ...
